titlestmt.titleproper: Guide to the Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Trisexual Books
Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Trisexual Books
titlestmt.author: by Beinecke staff

publicationstmt.publisher: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 9962292.

maintenanceagency.agencyname: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Thursday December 28, 2017 at 14:27

did.unittitle: Transgender erotic pulp fiction collection from the series Trisexual books

corpname.part: Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library

did.abstract: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing, forced feminization, other transgender activity, and lesbian and gay erotics.

accessrestrict.head: Information about Access
accessrestrict.p: This collection is open for research.

userestrict.head: Ownership Copyright
userestrict.p: The Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Trisexual Books is the physical property of the Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University. Literary rights, including copyright, belong to the authors or their legal heirs and assigns. For further information, consult the appropriate curator.

prefercite.head: Cite As
prefercite.p: Transgender Erotic Pulp Fiction Collection from the Series Trisexual Books. General Collection, Beinecke Rare Book and Manuscript Library, Yale University.

scopecontent.head: Description of the Collection
scopecontent.p: Erotic pulp fiction related to male cross-dressing, forced feminization, other transgender activity, and lesbian and gay erotics.
Some individual titles (see accompanying list) taken from cover.
All individual titles paperbound.
Some titles include personal advertisements.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Stamp on bottom edge: Model Dist.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Stamp on bottom edge: Model Dist.

scopecontent.p: Undeciphered stamp on top edge

scopecontent.p: Stamp on top edge: SNG[?]

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Price label on front cover: Special $2.00 each.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Price label on front cover: Special $2.00 each.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Price label on front cover, slightly obscuring title: Special $2.00 each.

scopecontent.p: "Copy 1: Price label on front cover: Special $2.00 each. Copy 2: Stamp on bottom edge: 5"

scopecontent.p: Price label on front cover: Special $2.00 each.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Back cover detached

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Copy 2: Printed label for "CDL Mail Order" affixed to mail order form at very end of book, obscuring the original printed ordering address for Star Distributors
